message:
test(notion): add search sensitivity, provenance, and redaction integration tests

Add 6 integration tests (u56.4) for the Notion search operation:
- sensitivity metadata (workspace_wide) and taint markers
- filtered search (page-only) and empty result handling
- PII email redaction across people properties, created_by, and
  last_edited_by (both top-level fields and property types)
- capability enforcement (notion.read rejected for search)

All tests use MockServer with the established handshake/token pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
